name: Banana-Pecan Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
3. Add oil, eggs, sour cream, and vanilla to the dry ingredients. Mix until well combined.
4. Gently fold in chopped pecans.
5. Pour batter into a greased loaf pan.
6. Bake for 45-50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow bread to cool completely before slicing and serving.
